name: IMPROPER_INPUT_VALIDATION
description: The product receives input or data, but it does not validate or incorrectly validates that the input has the properties that are required to process the data safely and correctly.

name: PATH_TRAVERSAL
description: The product uses external input to construct a pathname that is intended to identify a file or directory that is located underneath a restricted parent directory, but the product does not properly neutralize special elements within the pathname that can cause the pathname to resolve to a location that is outside of the restricted directory.

name: OS_INJECTION
description: The product constructs all or part of an OS command using externally-influenced input from an upstream component, but it does not neutralize or incorrectly neutralizes special elements that could modify the intended OS command when it is sent to a downstream component.

name: XSS
description: The product does not neutralize or incorrectly neutralizes user-controllable input before it is placed in output that is used as a web page that is served to other users.

name: SQL_INJECTION
description: The product constructs all or part of an SQL command using externally-influenced input from an upstream component, but it does not neutralize or incorrectly neutralizes special elements that could modify the intended SQL command when it is sent to a downstream component. Without sufficient removal or quoting of SQL syntax in user-controllable inputs, the generated SQL query can cause those inputs to be interpreted as SQL instead of ordinary user data.

name: CODE_INJECTION
description: The product constructs all or part of a code segment using externally-influenced input from an upstream component, but it does not neutralize or incorrectly neutralizes special elements that could modify the syntax or behavior of the intended code segment.

name: IMPROPER_OUTPUT_NEUTRALIZATION_FOR_LOGS
description: The product does not neutralize or incorrectly neutralizes output that is written to logs.

name: ERROR_INFO_LEAKAGE
description: The product generates an error message that includes sensitive information about its environment, users, or associated data.

name: IMPROPER_ACCESS_CONTROL
description: The product does not restrict or incorrectly restricts access to a resource from an unauthorized actor.

name: IMPROPER_AUTHENTICATION
description: When an actor claims to have a given identity, the product does not prove or insufficiently proves that the claim is correct.

name: BRUTE_FORCE_NO_RATE_LIMIT
description: The product does not implement sufficient measures to prevent multiple failed authentication attempts within a short time frame, making it easier for attackers to perform brute force attacks.

name: USE_OF_BROKEN_CRYPTO
description: Use of broken or risky cryptographic algorithm

name: USE_OF_WEAK_PRNG
description: Use of weak pseudo-random number generator

name: JWT_NO_EXPIRY
description: The product does not sufficiently verify the origin or authenticity of data, issuing JWT tokens without an expiration claim.

name: JWT_WEAK_SECRET
description: The product does not verify, or incorrectly verifies, the cryptographic signature for data, using a weak or guessable HMAC secret for JWT signing.

name: CSRF_MISSING
description: The web application does not, or can not, sufficiently verify whether a well-formed, valid, consistent request was intentionally provided by the user who submitted the request (Cross-Site Request Forgery).

name: SESSION_FIXATION
description: New sessions without invalidating existing session IDs

name: UNCONTROLLED_RESOURCE_CONSUMPTION
description: The product does not properly control the allocation and maintenance of a limited resource, thereby enabling an actor to influence the amount of resources consumed, eventually leading to the exhaustion of available resources.

name: UNRESTRICTED_UPLOAD_WITH_DANGEROUS_FILE
description: The product allows the upload or transfer of dangerous file types that are automatically processed within its environment.

name: DESERIALIZATION_OF_UNTRUSTED_DATA
description: Deserializes untrusted data without verification

name: INSUFFICIENTLY_PROTECTED_CREDENTIALS
description: The product transmits or stores authentication credentials, but it uses an insecure method that is susceptible to unauthorized interception and/or retrieval.

name: XXE
description: XML External Entity injection

name: SESSION_NOT_INVALIDATED
description: The product does not sufficiently expire or invalidate a session after logout, allowing the session to be reused.

name: SESSION_NO_HTTPONLY
description: The product uses a cookie to store sensitive information, but the cookie is not marked with the HttpOnly flag.

name: FAILING_OPEN
description: Falls back to less secure state on error

name: IDOR
description: Insecure Direct Object Reference

name: WEAK_PASSWORD_RECOVERY
description: Weak password recovery mechanism

name: MISSING_SECURITY_HEADERS
description: The product does not use or incorrectly uses a protection mechanism that provides sufficient defense against directed attacks against the product (missing security headers such as X-Content-Type-Options, X-Frame-Options, Content-Security-Policy).

name: IMPROPER_CHECK_OR_HANDLING_OF_EXCEPTIONAL_CONDITIONS
description: The product does not properly anticipate or handle exceptional conditions that rarely occur during normal operation of the product.

name: HARDCODED_CREDENTIALS
description: Hard-coded credentials in source code

name: BUSINESS_LOGIC_ERROR
description: Business rules not properly enforced

name: MISSING_AUTHORIZATION
description: Missing authorization check on resources

name: INCORRECT_AUTHORIZATION
description: The product performs an authorization check when an actor attempts to access a resource or perform an action, but it does not correctly perform the check.

name: MASS_ASSIGNMENT
description: Unrestricted property modification

name: SSRF
description: Server-Side Request Forgery

name: PERMISSIVE_CORS
description: Overly permissive cross-domain policy

name: VULNERABLE_COMPONENT
description: Third-party components with known vulnerabilities

name: SESSION_NO_SAMESITE
description: The product uses a cookie to store sensitive information, but the cookie is not marked with the SameSite attribute.
